key_highlights: Trump evacuated after shooting at White House Correspondents' Dinner; gunman detained, security implications for markets.
Iran war and Hormuz blockade continue to disrupt global oil markets, with U.S. crude oil arriving in Japan for first time since crisis.
Big Tech earnings week (Apple, Amazon, Google) is make-or-break for market rally; Mag 7 stocks in focus.
Fed expected to hold rates this week amid uneasy G-7 backdrop; Powell update and Treasury auctions key.
SpaceX IPO anticipation drives interest in related stocks (Linde, ATI, Howmet, Honeywell, Freeport-McMoRan).
Inflation reignites, prompting renewed interest in I Bonds and defensive portfolios.
Hedge funds favor new stocks like Reddit, Toast, and Talen Energy; private credit funds attract bargain hunters.
Geopolitical tensions: Russia defense minister visits North Korea, EU leaders convene in Cyprus amid Iran war.
Bank of America's 'sleep like a baby' portfolio has best year since 1933, signaling risk-off rotation.
U.S. energy exports hit record high amid Iran war disruptions; oil market avoids doomsday scenario so far.

sectors.trend: Earnings season for Mag 7 (Apple, Amazon, Google) is critical; AI trade remains bullish with Wall Street optimism. SpaceX IPO catalyst boosts aerospace/defense tech.
sectors.implications: Strong earnings could sustain rally; any miss may trigger correction. AI infrastructure spending (Alphabet $40B) supports long-term growth.

sectors.trend: Iran war and Hormuz blockade deepen shipping crisis; U.S. crude exports to Japan at record. Oil market avoids doomsday but supply risks persist.
sectors.implications: Energy stocks benefit from higher prices and U.S. export boom. Refiners like Reliance adapt with agile sourcing. Long-term demand may be hit by billion-barrel shock.

sectors.trend: SpaceX IPO anticipation boosts suppliers (Linde, ATI, Howmet, Honeywell, Freeport-McMoRan). Lockheed Martin CEO signals strong Middle East focus.
sectors.implications: Defense spending likely to increase amid geopolitical tensions. SpaceX IPO could unlock value for related companies.

sectors.trend: Investors seek safety in dividend stocks (Comfort Systems, Sherwin-Williams) and I Bonds amid inflation reignition. BofA's defensive portfolio outperforms.
sectors.implications: Rotation into quality dividend payers and inflation-protected assets likely. Utilities and consumer staples may benefit.

sectors.trend: Private credit funds attract bargain hunters; Robinhood acquires $75M OpenAI stake. Fed rate hold supports bank margins.
sectors.implications: Alternative credit offers yield in uncertain rate environment. Fintech expansion into AI could drive growth.

sectors.trend: Investors dive back into frontier markets after April rally. Hong Kong IPOs raise $17.9B in 2026.
sectors.implications: Risk appetite returning to EM, but geopolitical risks (Iran, North Korea) warrant caution. Selective opportunities in Asia.

key_themes: Geopolitical risk: Iran war, Hormuz blockade, Trump shooting attempt, Russia-North Korea ties.
Monetary policy: Fed hold, Powell update, G-7 unease, Treasury auctions.
Inflation resurgence: I Bonds, defensive portfolios, rate hike expectations.
SpaceX IPO: Catalyst for aerospace/defense and industrial stocks.
AI and Big Tech earnings: Make-or-break for market rally.
Energy security: U.S. export boom, shipping crisis, oil demand shock.
Political uncertainty: Trump security incident, Fed chair transition (Warsh), DOJ drops Powell probe.
Consumer and retail: JetBlue data privacy lawsuit, Trader Joe's controversy, imported homes from China.

risk_assessment.risk_factor: Geopolitical escalation (Iran war, Hormuz blockade, Trump shooting)
risk_assessment.mitigation: Increase exposure to energy, defense, and safe-haven assets (gold, Treasuries). Hedge currency risk in oil-dependent economies.

risk_assessment.risk_factor: Inflation reignition and Fed policy misstep
risk_assessment.mitigation: Allocate to I Bonds, TIPS, and dividend growth stocks. Reduce duration in bond portfolios. Monitor Powell's tone.
Diversify into value and defensive sectors. Use options to hedge downside in Mag 7 positions.

risk_assessment.risk_factor: Supply chain disruption from Hormuz blockade
risk_assessment.mitigation: Invest in U.S. energy exporters and logistics companies. Avoid sectors heavily reliant on Middle East shipping.

risk_assessment.risk_factor: Political instability (US security incident, Fed chair transition)
risk_assessment.mitigation: Maintain cash reserves. Monitor policy continuity; Warsh as Fed chair could signal hawkish shift.

risk_assessment.risk_factor: Private credit and frontier market liquidity risk
risk_assessment.mitigation: Limit exposure to illiquid private credit funds. Focus on high-quality EM sovereigns and large-cap frontier stocks.

opportunities.recommendation: Buy U.S. energy exporters and oil services stocks
opportunities.rationale: Record U.S. crude exports to Japan and Hormuz blockade support higher prices and volumes. Companies like Exxon, Chevron, and Schlumberger benefit.

opportunities.recommendation: Accumulate aerospace/defense stocks ahead of SpaceX IPO
opportunities.rationale: SpaceX IPO catalyst and rising defense budgets (Lockheed Martin, Howmet, ATI) provide upside. Linde's rocket fuel expertise is key.

opportunities.recommendation: Invest in I Bonds and TIPS for inflation protection
opportunities.rationale: Inflation reigniting makes inflation-protected securities attractive. I Bonds offer tax advantages and principal protection.

opportunities.recommendation: Buy quality dividend stocks with pricing power
opportunities.rationale: BofA's defensive portfolio outperformance and dividend focus (Comfort Systems, Sherwin-Williams) indicate rotation into stable earners.
Post-April rally and strong HK IPO pipeline suggest renewed interest. Focus on commodity-rich economies and tech hubs.

defensive_moves.recommendation: Reduce exposure to Mag 7 stocks ahead of earnings
defensive_moves.rationale: High expectations and geopolitical risks could lead to sharp sell-offs if results disappoint. Lock in profits or hedge.
Fed hold and inflation uncertainty warrant liquidity. Short-term Treasuries offer safety and yield with minimal duration risk.

defensive_moves.recommendation: Hedge against oil price spike with put options on consumer discretionary
defensive_moves.rationale: Hormuz blockade and shipping crisis could spike oil prices, hurting airlines, cruise lines, and retailers.

defensive_moves.recommendation: Avoid private credit funds with illiquid structures
defensive_moves.rationale: Bargain hunting in private credit may mask liquidity risks. Stick to publicly traded BDCs or senior loan ETFs.

market_outlook.short_term: 1-3 month outlook: Markets remain volatile due to geopolitical shocks (Iran war, Trump shooting) and Big Tech earnings. Fed hold and inflation data will dictate direction. Defensive rotation likely, with energy and defense outperforming. Risk of correction if Mag 7 earnings disappoint.
market_outlook.long_term: 6-12 month outlook: Gradual normalization if Iran ceasefire progresses and Fed pivots to cuts. AI and space economy (SpaceX IPO) provide structural growth. Inflation may stay elevated, favoring real assets and dividend growers. Frontier markets could benefit from diversification.
key_catalysts: Mag 7 earnings reports (Apple, Amazon, Google) this week.
Fed rate decision and Powell's commentary on April 29-30.
Iran ceasefire talks progress or collapse.
SpaceX IPO filing and valuation details.
U.S. Treasury auctions and yield curve dynamics.
Trump security incident fallout and political stability.
EU leaders' response to Iran war (Cyprus summit).
watch_list: WTI and Brent crude oil prices (Hormuz blockade impact).
U.S. dollar index (DXY) vs. commodity currencies.
Big Tech earnings beats/misses and forward guidance.
SpaceX IPO timeline and related stock movements.
Hong Kong IPO pipeline and frontier market inflows.
Private credit fund redemptions and NAV stability.
JetBlue data privacy lawsuit outcome (consumer sentiment).
